lyrics.text: 山野的风趟过了那片河
lyrics.pinyin: shān yě de fēng tàng guò le nà piàn hé
lyrics.trans: The mountain wind waded across that river

lyrics.text: 无畏翻山越岭的跋涉
lyrics.pinyin: wú wèi fān shān yuè lǐng de bá shè
lyrics.trans: Fearlessly trekking over mountains and ridges

lyrics.text: 就像我们之间千里万里相隔
lyrics.pinyin: jiù xiàng wǒ men zhī jiān qiān lǐ wàn lǐ xiāng gé
lyrics.trans: Just like how we are separated by thousands of miles

lyrics.text: 我也要走到你的身侧
lyrics.pinyin: wǒ yě yào zǒu dào nǐ de shēn cè
lyrics.trans: I will still walk to your side

lyrics.text: 你的温柔袭来的那一刻
lyrics.pinyin: nǐ de wēn róu xí lái de nà yī kè
lyrics.trans: The moment your gentleness struck

lyrics.text: 击中了无处闪躲的我
lyrics.pinyin: jī zhōng le wú chù shǎn duǒ de wǒ
lyrics.trans: It hit me who had nowhere to hide

lyrics.text: 我望向你时眸中盛满了暮色
lyrics.pinyin: wǒ wàng xiàng nǐ shí móu zhōng shèng mǎn le mù sè
lyrics.trans: When I looked at you, my eyes were filled with twilight

lyrics.text: 恰好撞进了你眼中的清澈
lyrics.pinyin: qià hǎo zhuàng jìn le nǐ yǎn zhōng de qīng chè
lyrics.trans: And happened to crash into the clarity of your eyes

lyrics.text: 你在窗前偷听我写给月亮的诗歌
lyrics.pinyin: nǐ zài chuāng qián tōu tīng wǒ xiě gěi yuè liang de shī gē
lyrics.trans: You eavesdropped by the window on the poem I wrote for the moon

lyrics.text: 我在月下将我们的故事讲给篝火
lyrics.pinyin: wǒ zài yuè xià jiāng wǒ men de gù shì jiǎng gěi gōu huǒ
lyrics.trans: I told our story to the bonfire under the moonlight

lyrics.text: 原来遇见你之后才懂得
lyrics.pinyin: yuán lái yù jiàn nǐ zhī hòu cái dǒng de
lyrics.trans: It turns out I only understood after meeting you

lyrics.text: 人间的美好都因你而深刻
lyrics.pinyin: rén jiān de měi hǎo dōu yīn nǐ ér shēn kè
lyrics.trans: All the beauty in the world is profound because of you

lyrics.text: 你在窗前偷听我写给月亮的诗歌
lyrics.pinyin: nǐ zài chuāng qián tōu tīng wǒ xiě gěi yuè liang de shī gē
lyrics.trans: You eavesdropped by the window on the poem I wrote for the moon

lyrics.text: 我在星光下捕捉浪漫飞舞的萤火
lyrics.pinyin: wǒ zài xīng guāng xià bǔ zhuō làng màn fēi wǔ de yíng huǒ
lyrics.trans: Under the starlight, I catch the romantic, dancing fireflies

lyrics.text: 万物困于这朦胧的夜色
lyrics.pinyin: wàn wù kùn yú zhè méng lóng de yè sè
lyrics.trans: All things are trapped in this hazy night

lyrics.text: 而我困于你每时每刻
lyrics.pinyin: ér wǒ kùn yú nǐ měi shí měi kè
lyrics.trans: And I am trapped in you every moment
